careers.description: Delivered new product features, improved system reliability, expanded test coverage, and modernized legacy code through ongoing refactoring and technical debt reduction.

Led development of scalable cloud applications, defined system architecture, mentored engineers, and delivered reliable full-stack solutions using Ruby on Rails, Vue.js, TypeScript, and cloud technologies.
Delivered software solutions, improving performance, maintainability, and code quality while supporting junior developers through mentoring and code reviews.
Implemented features and fixed bugs under senior guidance, improved reliability through automated tests, and contributed to code reviews and collaborative web application development.
